title: Evaluating "Full Value Protection" vs. "Released Value" Insurance for Premium Electronics in Ethiopia
excerpt: Full value protection vs released value insurance: premium electronics moving Ethiopia, declared value coverage, moving insurance comparison Addis movers.
content:
Evaluating "full value protection" vs. "released value" insurance for premium electronics in Ethiopia

Premium electronics—MacBook Pro, OLED TV, studio monitors—ship default "released value" coverage pennies per kilo unless you elect full value protection. Evaluating insurance before truck means claim pays replacement not symbolic birr that buys nothing after cobble shock.

This guide compares full value protection and released value for electronics moves in Ethiopia.

Released value explained

Minimum legal baseline—compensation often weight-based far below retail. Fifty-kilo box mixed goods might cap low four figures total loss. Owner-packed electronics may exclude entirely policy fine print.

Full value protection explained

Declared value list items or categories; premium fee percentage of declared total; repair replace or cash to declared cap if mover negligence proven. Vendor-packed fragile stronger claim than owner-packed.

Electronics-specific considerations

  • Serial numbers inventory photos pre-move.
  • Original packaging claim strength.
  • Consequential data loss rarely covered—backup separate.
  • Gradual shock failure hard prove—document immediate test destination.

Decision matrix

Electronics declared value under released cap—maybe accept risk conscious. Single OLED plus desktop exceeds cap tenfold—full value rational. Mixed household one policy full value entire shipment sometimes simpler.

Ethiopia market realities

Read policy Amharic English both if issued; insurer registration verify; exclusions war riot act of God standard—cobble negligence arguable if vendor packed.

Active Movers insurance options

Declared value annex at contract sign; certificate copy request; vendor pack recommended high-tier electronics.

Conclusion

Premium electronics deserve full value protection evaluation—released value saves premium until loss proves theater; declare honestly pay appropriate coverage sleep move night.
author: Active Movers Team
